title: The Shadow's Separate Dwelling

features.name: shadow dwelling
features.desc-on-touch: A shape that was once cast but has learned to stand alone. It occupies space the way a body might, but without the body to explain it. You feel it before you see it.

features.name: doubled reflection
features.desc-on-touch: A pool that shows not what is above it but what the shadow remembers—a choreography of separation, intimate and violent at once, a slow incision between caster and cast.

features.name: glyph of severance
features.desc-on-touch: A mark that reads as both question and answer: how does a shadow learn to exist when the light that cast it is gone? The mark says: by learning that it never needed the light, only the memory of light.

features.name: separation arch
features.desc-on-touch: A doorway leading from the place of attachment to the place of independence. The arch itself is both threshold and wound—a careful opening where violation becomes healing.

features.name: independent motion
features.desc-on-touch: A wireframe suggesting movement—a shadow dancing without a dancer, turning without a source of light. The dance is its own justification now.

inscription: the shadow learns that casting was temporary; being cast is permanent; separating is possible

file.name: The_Motel_Shadow_Choreography_Study.txt
file.note: Documentation of how a cast shape learned to move independently. Pages describe the slow incision of separation, the careful suturing of a new kind of wholeness. Some pages seem to bleed into one anot

exits.label: back through the wall where shadows live
toward the rim, where shadows sharpen at the edge of light
deeper into the blue where the shadow remembers being cast
